data.content:
### POST Apply Payment Service

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/brandingthemes

Applies a payment service to a branding theme. Requires the PaymentServiceID. Multiple custom payment services can be associated, but only the last one in the request will be used for online invoices.

```http
POST https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/BrandingThemes/{BrandingThemeID}/PaymentServices
```

--------------------------------

### POST Apply Payment Service Request

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/brandingthemes

Example JSON request body for applying a payment service to a branding theme. It includes an array of PaymentServices, each with a PaymentServiceID.

```json
{
"PaymentServices": [{
"PaymentServiceID": "de5c978d-3cbf-4ebb-9ca9-20d7cb196ab1"  }]
}
```

--------------------------------

### GET Payment Services

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/brandingthemes

Retrieves the payment services applied to a branding theme. The response includes details like PaymentServiceID, PaymentServiceName, PaymentServiceUrl, PayNowText, and PaymentServiceType. The URL can contain placeholders for invoice data.

```http
GET https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/BrandingThemes/{BrandingThemeID}/PaymentServices
```

--------------------------------

### GET Payment Services Response

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/brandingthemes

Example JSON response for retrieving payment services. It lists payment services with their IDs, names, and types. Custom services may include a URL and specific text for the 'Pay Now' button.

```json
{
"PaymentServices": [{
"PaymentServiceID": "0751da5f-8b28-4f93-b05e-1b85bedfd900",
"PaymentServiceName": "DONOTPAYTHISISFAKE@fakedemoaccount.com",
"PaymentServiceType": "PayPal"  },
  {
"PaymentServiceID": "7f0f43b1-9ba9-4ba4-a785-e677652c7d7e",
"PaymentServiceName": "Awesome Pay",
"PaymentServiceUrl": "https://www.awesomepay.com/?invoiceNo=[INVOICENUMBER]&currency=[CURRENCY]&amount=[AMOUNTDUE]&shortCode=[SHORTCODE]",
"PayNowText": "Pay via AwesomePay",
"PaymentServiceType": "Custom"
}]
}
```

--------------------------------

### Retrieve All Branding Themes (HTTP)

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/brandingthemes

This snippet shows the HTTP GET request to retrieve a list of all branding themes available in Xero. It outlines the URL structure for the request.

```HTTP
GET https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/BrandingThemes
```

--------------------------------

### Retrieve Individual Branding Theme (HTTP)

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/brandingthemes

This snippet demonstrates the HTTP GET request to retrieve details for a specific branding theme using its unique ID. It shows the URL structure including the BrandingThemeID placeholder.

```HTTP
GET https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/BrandingThemes/a94a78db-5cc6-4e26-a52b-045237e56e6e
```

--------------------------------

### Create Receive Money Transaction with Tracking Category

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/banktransactions

Example of specifying a tracking category with a receive money transaction. This shows how to associate tracking categories with line items.

```HTTP
POST https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/BankTransactions
```

```JSON
{
"Type": "RECEIVE",
"Contact": {
"ContactID": "6d42f03b-181f-43e3-93fb-2025c012de92"
},
"LineAmountTypes": "Inclusive",
"LineItems": [{
"Description": "Monthly Retainer",
"UnitAmount": "575.00",
"AccountCode": "200",
"Tracking": [{
"Name": "Activity/Workstream",
"Option": "Website management"
    }]
  }],
"BankAccount": {
"Code": "091"
},
"Url": "http://www.accounting20.com"
}
```

--------------------------------

### Retrieve All Branding Themes (JSON Response)

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/brandingthemes

This snippet provides an example JSON response for a GET request to the Branding Themes API, listing multiple branding themes with their respective details like ID, Name, Type, and creation date.

```JSON
{
"BrandingThemes": [{
"BrandingThemeID": "aefae6d5-7bbe-4e2e-aadc-302cd07a0fc1",
"Name": "Standard",
"Type": "INVOICE",
"SortOrder": 0,
"CreatedDateUTC": "\/Date(1277835396270+0000)\/"  },
  {
"BrandingThemeID": "dfe23d27-a3a6-4ef3-a5ca-b9e02b142dde",
"Name": "Special Projects",
"LogoUrl": "https://in.xero.com/logo?id=ZXcwS0lDQWlieUk2SUNJME5XVTBOekE0WlMxa09EWXlMVFF4TVRFdFlXSXpZUzFrWkRoalpEQXpPVEV6WlRFaUxBMEtJQ0FpWmlJNklDSXhOalJtWVRRelpDMWlOamsyTFRRNVlqSXRPR1F5TWkwMFpqTXlOamxtTnpWbU1XRWlEUXA5LVU0Zkh4TVNiYVRzPQ",
"Type": "INVOICE",
"SortOrder": 1,
"CreatedDateUTC": "\/Date(946684800000+0000)\/"  },
  {
"BrandingThemeID": "2ced98b8-3be9-42c4-ae79-fe3c8bca3490",
"Name": "Very orange invoice!",
"Type": "INVOICE",
"SortOrder": 2,
"CreatedDateUTC": "\/Date(1357339258680+0000)\/"  }]
}
```

--------------------------------

### Retrieve Individual Branding Theme (JSON Response)

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/brandingthemes

This snippet provides an example JSON response for retrieving a single branding theme by its ID. It includes details such as BrandingThemeID, Name, LogoUrl, Type, SortOrder, and CreatedDateUTC.

```JSON
{
"BrandingThemes": [{
"BrandingThemeID": "dfe23d27-a3a6-4ef3-a5ca-b9e02b142dde",
"Name": "Special Projects",
"LogoUrl": "https://in.xero.com/logo?id=ZXcwS0lDQWlieUk2SUNJME5XVTBOekE0WlMxa09EWXlMVFF4TVRFdFlXSXpZUzFrWkRoalpEQXpPVEV6WlRFaUxBMEtJQ0FpWmlJNklDSXhOalJtWVRRelpDMWlOamsyTFRRNVlqSXRPR1F5TWkwMFpqTXlOamxtTnpWbU1XRWlEUXA5LVU0Zkh4TVNiYVRzPQ",
"Type": "INVOICE",
"SortOrder": 1,
"CreatedDateUTC": "\/Date(946684800000+0000)\/"  }]
}
```

--------------------------------

### Create Minimum Tracked Item - POST Items

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/items

Creates a new tracked item with minimum required properties for tracking. This includes the 'Code', 'COGSAccountCode' for purchases, and 'InventoryAssetAccountCode'.

```JSON
{
"Code": "TrackedItem",
"PurchaseDetails": {
"COGSAccountCode": "300"  },
"InventoryAssetAccountCode": "630"
}
```

--------------------------------

### Xero API: Payroll Payslip Scopes

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Scopes for managing and viewing payslips within the Xero Payroll API for Australia. This allows access to payslip details. Read-only access is also available.

```text
payroll.payslip: View and manage your payslips | Payslips
payroll.payslip.read: View your payslips | _As above but GET only_
```

--------------------------------

### Xero API: Filter Invoices by Amount Due Range

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/invoices

This snippet shows how to filter invoices based on a numerical range for the 'AmountDue' field using the greater than or equal to (>=) and less than (<) operators in the Xero API 'where' clause.

```url
where=AmountDue>=5000 AND AmountDue<6000
```

--------------------------------

### Create Full Tracked Item - POST Items

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/items

Creates a tracked item with all available details, including purchase and sales pricing, tax types, and asset account codes. This provides comprehensive item configuration.

```JSON
{
"Code": "FullTracked",
"Description": "Sell me",
"PurchaseDescription": "Purchase me",
"PurchaseDetails": {
"UnitPrice": 75.5555,
"COGSAccountCode": "300",
"TaxType": "INPUT2"  },
"SalesDetails": {
"UnitPrice": 1020.5555,
"AccountCode": "260",
"TaxType": "OUTPUT2"  },
"Name": "Full Tracked Item",
"InventoryAssetAccountCode": "630",
"IsSold": true,
"IsPurchased": true
}
```

--------------------------------

### Create Receive Overpayment Transaction

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/banktransactions

Example of creating a receive overpayment transaction. Overpayments can only have a single line item.

```HTTP
POST https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/BankTransactions
```

```JSON
{
"Type": "RECEIVE-OVERPAYMENT",
"Contact": { "ContactID": "6d42f03b-181f-43e3-93fb-2025c012de92" },
"BankAccount": { "Code": "090" },
"LineAmountTypes": "NoTax",
"LineItems": [{
"Description": "Forgot to cancel annual sub payment",
"LineAmount": "100.00"  }]
}
```

--------------------------------

### Retrieve Accounts Endpoint

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/how-to-guides/integration-best-practices

This snippet demonstrates how to fetch the user's chart of accounts from the Xero API. It's crucial for populating dropdowns and allowing users to map their accounts correctly. The response includes account details like type and whether payments can be applied.

```JavaScript
import XeroClient from 'xero-node';

const xero = new XeroClient({
  // ... client options
});

async function getAccounts(tenantId) {
  try {
    const accounts = await xero.accountingApi.getAccounts(tenantId);
    console.log(accounts.body.accounts);
    return accounts.body.accounts;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching accounts:', error);
    throw error;
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Manage UK Payroll Payslips

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Allows viewing and managing payslip data within the UK payroll system. This includes access to individual employee payslips.

```Xero API
payroll.payslip
```

--------------------------------

### Manage New Zealand Payroll Payslips

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Enables viewing and managing payslip data within the New Zealand payroll system. This includes access to employee payslips.

```Xero API
payroll.payslip
```

--------------------------------

### Fetch Accounts Endpoint - Xero API

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api-guides/integration-best-practices

This snippet demonstrates how to retrieve a user's chart of accounts from the Xero API. It's crucial for populating dropdowns and allowing users to map their accounts correctly. The response includes account details like type and whether payments can be applied.

```HTTP
GET https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/Accounts

// Example Response Snippet:
{
  "Id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-1234-567890abcdef",
  "Name": "Sales",
  "Code": "750",
  "Type": "REVENUE",
  "EnablePaymentsToAccount": false
},
{
  "Id": "b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-2345-67890abcdef0",
  "Name": "Checking Account",
  "Code": "990",
  "Type": "BANK",
  "EnablePaymentsToAccount": true
}
```

--------------------------------

### Retrieve Batch Payments by Type

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/batchpayments

This snippet demonstrates how to retrieve batch payments filtered by their type, specifically 'PAYBATCH'. It utilizes the 'where' parameter for optimized filtering.

```http
GET https://.../BatchPayments?where=Type="PAYBATCH"
```

--------------------------------

### Filter Accounts by EnablePaymentsToAccount

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/how-to-guides/integration-best-practices

This example shows how to filter the list of accounts retrieved from Xero. It specifically looks for accounts where 'EnablePaymentsToAccount' is true and the 'AccountType' is 'BANK', which is necessary for handling payments correctly.

```JavaScript
function filterAccountsForPayments(accounts) {
  return accounts.filter(account => 
    account.EnablePaymentsToAccount && account.AccountType === 'BANK'
  );
}
```

--------------------------------

### Xero API Payroll Error Example

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/development-accounts

This snippet shows a typical ApiException returned by the Xero API when payroll has not been provisioned for an organization. It includes the error number, type, and a descriptive message.

```xml
<ApiException xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"><ErrorNumber>0</ErrorNumber><Type>Error</Type><Message>Payroll has not been provisioned</Message></ApiException>
```

--------------------------------

### Read New Zealand Payroll Payslips

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Provides read-only access to payslip data for the New Zealand payroll system. This scope is for retrieving payslip information.

```Xero API
payroll.payslip.read
```

--------------------------------

### Read UK Payroll Payslips

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Provides read-only access to payslip data for the UK payroll system. This scope is for retrieving payslip information.

```Xero API
payroll.payslip.read
```

--------------------------------

### Create Minimum Untracked Item - POST Items

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/items

Creates a new untracked item with only the essential 'Code' property. This is the most basic way to add an item to Xero.

```JSON
{
"Code": "Item-1"
}
```

--------------------------------

### Create Receive Prepayment Transaction

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/banktransactions

Example of creating a receive prepayment transaction. This allows for multiple line items for prepayments.

```HTTP
POST https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/BankTransactions
```

```JSON
{
"Type": "RECEIVE-PREPAYMENT",
"Contact": { "ContactID": "6d42f03b-181f-43e3-93fb-2025c012de92" },
"BankAccount": { "Code": "090" },
"LineAmountTypes": "Exclusive",
"LineItems": [{
"Description": "Prepayment for Kitchen Designs",
"Quantity": "1",
"UnitAmount": "500.00",
"AccountCode": "200"  },{
"Description": "Prepayment for Kitchen materials",
"Quantity": "1",
"UnitAmount": "1000.00",
"AccountCode": "200"  }]
}
```

--------------------------------

### GET Contacts - Pagination Example

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/contacts

Illustrates how to use the 'page' and 'pageSize' parameters to implement pagination for retrieving contacts. This allows for fetching data in manageable chunks.

```http
page=1
```

```http
page=1&pageSize=250
```

--------------------------------

### Xero API: Payroll Payruns Scopes

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Scopes for managing and viewing pay runs within the Xero Payroll API for Australia. This includes accessing pay run data. Read-only access is also provided.

```text
payroll.payruns: View and manage your pay runs | Payruns
payroll.payruns.read: View your pay runs | _As above but GET only_
```

--------------------------------

### Retrieve All Bank Transfers

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/banktransfers

Fetches a list of all bank transfers. This endpoint can be filtered by specifying a BankTransferID in the URL. The 'If-Modified-Since' header can be used for conditional requests based on modification time.

```http
GET https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/BankTransfers
```

--------------------------------

### Manage UK Payroll Settings

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Allows viewing and managing payroll settings for the UK system. This includes access to payrun calendars, tracking categories, and earning rates.

```Xero API
payroll.settings
```

--------------------------------

### Retrieve Invoices with SummaryOnly Parameter

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/invoices

Use the `summaryOnly=True` parameter in a GET request to the Invoices endpoint to receive a smaller response. This excludes computation-heavy fields like Payments and LineItems, making API calls faster. This parameter works with other filters but not when filtering on excluded fields. Pagination is enforced by default when `summaryOnly` is used.

```http
https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/invoices?summaryOnly=True
```

--------------------------------

### Example Response for Single Budget

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/budgets

Illustrates the JSON structure returned when a single budget is successfully retrieved via the API. It includes budget details, tracking categories, and budget lines with amounts per period.

```JSON
{
"Budgets": {
"BudgetID": "c1d195d4-92aa-4abd-867a-7ac2f9d60500",
"Type": "TRACKING",
"Description": "Daniel's Northern Budget",
"UpdatedDateUTC": "2017-08-14T01:18:26.74",
"Tracking": [
       {
"Name": "Region",
"Option": "North",
"TrackingCategoryID": "e94ba240-3edf-4ef3-8317-10147b968f94",
"Options": []
       },
       {
"Name": "Salesperson",
"Option": "Daniel",
"TrackingCategoryID": "d8580491-4167-4a81-9624-ad3bdd8e46ce",
"Options": []
       }
    ],
"BudgetLines": [
       {
"AccountID": "9c24de87-a2b7-439d-a216-35d1af7bdec3",
"AccountCode": "200",
"BudgetBalances": [
             {
"Period": "2019-08",
"Amount": "1000"             },
             {
"Period": "2019-09",
"Amount": "1050"             },
             {
"Period": "2019-10",
"Amount": "1102"             }
          ]
       },
       {
"AccountID": "385f90ae-e798-4990-9b1c-db8eb8b735c2",
"AccountCode": "420",
"BudgetBalances": [
             {
"Period": "2019-08",
"Amount": "500"             },
             {
"Period": "2019-09",
"Amount": "505"             },
             {
"Period": "2019-10",
"Amount": "510"             }
          ]
       }
    ]
    }
 }


```

--------------------------------

### Manage UK Payroll Timesheets

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Enables viewing and managing timesheet data for the UK payroll system. This includes access to employee timesheet submissions.

```Xero API
payroll.timesheets
```

--------------------------------

### Manage New Zealand Payroll Settings

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Enables viewing and managing payroll settings for the New Zealand system. This includes access to payrun calendars and tracking categories.

```Xero API
payroll.settings
```

--------------------------------

### Xero API: Payroll Timesheets Scopes

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Scopes for managing and viewing timesheets within the Xero Payroll API for Australia. This includes accessing timesheet data. Read-only access is also provided.

```text
payroll.timesheets: View and manage your timesheets | Timesheets
payroll.timesheets.read: View your timesheets | _As above but GET only_
```

--------------------------------

### Xero API: Payroll Employees Scopes

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Scopes for managing and viewing employee information within the Xero Payroll API for Australia. This includes managing leave applications. Read-only access is also available.

```text
payroll.employees: View and manage your employees | Employees, LeaveApplications
payroll.employees.read: View your employees | _As above but GET only_
```

--------------------------------

### Create Untracked Item with Details - POST Items

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/items

Creates an untracked item with sales and purchase details, including unit prices and account codes. This allows for more detailed item management for sales and purchases.

```JSON
{
"Code": "Merino-2011-LG",
"Name": "Full Tracked Item",
"Description": "2011 Merino Sweater - LARGE",
"PurchaseDescription": "2011 Merino Sweater - LARGE",
"PurchaseDetails": {
"UnitPrice": 149.0000,
"AccountCode": "300"  },
"SalesDetails": {
"UnitPrice": 299.0000,
"AccountCode": "200"  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Add or Update Draft Credit Notes API

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/api/accounting/creditnotes

Enables adding or updating draft credit notes. The API supports POST and PUT requests to the CreditNotes endpoint.

```bash
POST https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/CreditNotes
PUT https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/CreditNotes
```

--------------------------------

### Manage New Zealand Payroll Timesheets

Source: https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/scopes

Allows viewing and managing timesheet data for the New Zealand payroll system. This includes access to employee timesheets.

```Xero API
payroll.timesheets
```
